"C:\Program Files (x86)\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Washer_wiperTest.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Washer_wiperTest.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Washer_wiperTest.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Washer_wiperTest.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o Washer_wiperTest.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libWasher_wiperTest.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Washer_wiperTest.dir\linkLibs.rsp
